answer: I chose 'Label all instances as N' as the baseline because it's the simplest default rule and noun attachment is common. For ordering, I chose B-C-A to apply rules from most specific (food items clearly modify nouns) to moderately specific (act with manner modifiers) to most general (like verbs with object specification).
